chief_complaint: A 45.5-year-old male presented with headache after traveling to Italy.
history: The patient had clinical signs of meningitis, including headache, and reported insect bites. He underwent lumbar puncture and serological testing.
exam: Vital signs and physical examination findings are not provided.
labs: Lumbar puncture confirmed the diagnosis in three cases, and IgM/IgG serology confirmed infection in all cases. TOSV detection by polymerase chain reaction in serum was possible in one patient, with nucleic acid sequencing identifying a lineage B strain.
correct_diagnosis: Imported aseptic meningitis due to Toscana virus infection
differentials: Imported aseptic meningitis due to Toscana virus infection
correct_ranking: Imported aseptic meningitis due to Toscana virus infection
